top.name: Sovereign Pillars
top.rules_text: Permanently enchant 3 tiles as Sovereign Pillars: allies on them gain +2 to all stats, enemies adjacent deal 2 less and are Hexed if they end their turn there. Pillars cannot be destroyed.

bottom.name: Puppeteer
bottom.rules_text: For 2 turns: at the start of each enemy turn, you choose where each enemy moves (up to 2 tiles). Enemies moved onto your glyphs trigger them.

changes.value: Permanently enchant 3 Sovereign Pillars: allies on them gain +3 to all stats, adjacent enemies deal 2 less and are Hexed. Indestructible.
For 3 turns: choose where each enemy moves (up to 2 tiles) at the start of their turn. Glyph landings trigger.
Permanently enchant 4 Sovereign Pillars: allies gain +3 to all stats, adjacent enemies deal 2 less and are Hexed. Indestructible.

upgrades.description: Marionette: drag enemies up to 3 tiles.

changes.value: For 3 turns: choose where each enemy moves (up to 3 tiles). Glyph landings trigger.

upgrades.description: Throne of Pillars: pillars also bank Weave each turn.

changes.value: Enchant 4 indestructible pillars: allies +3 stats; adjacent enemies deal 2 less and are Hexed; gain 1 Weave/turn.

upgrades.description: Grand Puppeteer: controlled enemies are also Named.

changes.value: For 3 turns: choose each enemy's movement (up to 3 tiles); they are Named while controlled. Glyph landings trigger.

upgrades.description: Sovereign Dominion: five pillars and a punishing aura.

changes.value: Enchant 5 indestructible pillars: allies +4 stats; adjacent enemies deal 3 less, take 3, and are Named; gain 1 Weave/turn.

upgrades.description: The Unwritten Hand: total, lasting control of the field.

changes.value: For 4 turns: choose each enemy's movement AND whether it acts; they are Named while controlled. Glyph landings trigger.
